description_long: This is an adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She is wearing a short skirt and high-heeled sandals, with no visible upper body clothing. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, and her facial features are softly defined. The figure's posture is neutral, and her hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban pedestrian, possibly in a casual or semi-formal context.
description: A standing adult woman with a short skirt, high-heeled sandals, and hair in a bun, arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, bare upper torso, skirt, and high-heeled sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, skirt, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, skirt, and the bun hairstyle clearly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, skirt, and high-heeled sandals.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
